item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 021200Z AUTO 19007KT 9999 -RA FEW029/// SCT058/// BKN078/// ///CB 16/13 Q1017 TEMPO 23015G25KT 4000 TSRA
